title: Events & Customer Services Coordinator
description:
Events & Customer Services Coordinator

Apply: hiring@ministryoffootball.com.sg

Interested applicants MUST apply by resume and cover letter through emailing hiring@ministryoffootball.com.sg. We MUST receive an email application from you in order to consider you.

Roles and responsibilities

Business Development & Customer Acquisition

  • Lead customer acquisition efforts through strategic cold calling and marketing initiatives for all events associated with Ministry of Football (MOF) and Ministry of Sports (MOS)
  • Develop and implement marketing strategies to promote programs on www.ministryoffootball.com.sg and www.ministryofsports.com.sg
  • Build and maintain relationships with potential clients and partners to grow program participation

Program and Event Management

  • Attend and Oversee the planning, coordination, and execution of all MOF and MOS programs and events
  • Ensure smooth operation of all sporting activities and maintain high program quality standards
  • Monitor program performance and implement improvements based on feedback and outcomes
  • Manage program schedules, venues, and resources effectively
  • Handle participant inquiries and resolve any program-related issues

Freelancer Management

  • Identify, recruit, and maintain a pool of qualified freelance sports instructors and event staff
  • Coordinate freelancer schedules and assignments across various programs and events
  • Ensure all freelancers meet required qualifications and maintain appropriate certifications
  • Provide necessary briefings and guidance to freelancers to maintain program quality
  • Monitor freelancer performance and address any concerns or issues promptly

General Responsibilities

  • Maintain accurate records of all programs, events, and freelancer assignments
  • Ensure compliance with safety regulations and organizational policies
  • Provide regular reports on program performance and achievement of objectives
  • Collaborate with other departments to ensure seamless program delivery
  • Stay current with industry trends and best practices in sports program management

Join us for the greatest sports events experience in Singapore! See our website and social media pages!

http://ministryofsports.com.sg/

https://www.facebook.com/mos.com.sg/

https://www.instagram.com/ministryofsports.stars/

Interested applicants MUST apply by resume and cover letter by email.


You should possess the respective qualifications in managing events.


Interested applicants MUST apply by resume and cover letter through emailing hiring@ministryoffootball.com.sg. We MUST receive an email application from you in order to consider you.

postedCompany.description:
MOF IS SINGAPORE’S TOP 11-A-SIDE FOOTBALL LEAGUES, CUPS & COMPETITIONS ORGANIZER!

Well-organized and co-ordinated: no venue mix-ups or miscommunication
Deliver what we promise: weekly games are weekly games, no gaps (save for postponements)
Easily reachable and responsive hotlines
Professional and clear in our communication
Well-covered by photographers to highlight your football journey
Prepares for contingencies, such as standby referees etc. 
Fast & efficient in dealing with problems
Happy to hear feedback with humility
Firm in the enforcement of rules & regulations (afterall football is a sport), but fair in making judgments

See all our brands
